revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:(Dis)establishments in year category header]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:(Dis)establishments in year category header]] <nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>

{{Category other|{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|find|{{PAGENAME}}|^A?D? ?%d+ ?B?C? d?i?s?establishments$|plain=false}}|0|{{Error|Invalid page name.
[[Template:(Dis)establishments in year category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form {{nowrap|"YYYY establishments"}} or {{nowrap|"YYYY disestablishments"}}, where YYYY is an AD year (e.g. "2", "63", "815" or "1972"}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]|{{(Dis)establishments in year category header/core|year={{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|pattern=^A?D? ?(%d?%d?%d?%d) ?B?C? (d?i?s?establishments)$|%1|1|false}}|signed_year={{#ifexpr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{PAGENAME}}|BC|plain=false}} > 0|{{#expr: -{{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|pattern=^A?D? ?(%d?%d?%d?%d) ?B?C? (d?i?s?establishments)$|%1|1|false}} }}|{{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|pattern=^A?D? ?(%d?%d?%d?%d) ?B?C? (d?i?s?establishments)$|%1|1|false}}}}|year_full_text={{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|pattern=^(A?D? ?%d?%d?%d?%d ?B?C?) (d?i?s?establishments)$|%1|1|false}}|bc={{#ifexpr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{PAGENAME}}|BC|plain=false}} > 0|1}}|type={{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|pattern=^A?D? ?(%d?%d?%d?%d) ?B?C? (d?i?s?establishments)$|%2|1|false}}}}}}|{{Error|This page is not in the [[Wikipedia:Namespace|category namespace]].
[[Template:(Dis)establishments in year category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form {{nowrap|"YYYY establishments"}} or {{nowrap|"YYYY disestablishments"}}, where YYYY is an AD year (e.g. "2", "63", "815" or "1972"}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]}}{{Automatic category TOC}}{{Documentation|content=To make a category of the form "YYYY establishments" or "YYYY disestablishments", where YYYY is a year e.g. * [[:Category:6 establishments]] * [[:Category:95 establishments]] * [[:Category:727 establishments]] * [[:Category:1842 establishments]] * [[:Category:9 disestablishments]] * [[:Category:420 disestablishments]] * [[:Category:525 disestablishments]] * [[:Category:2013 disestablishments]] ==Usage== {{(Dis)establishments in year category header}} No parameters needed == See also == * [[Template:(Dis)establishments in decade category header]] }} [[Category:Establishments and disestablishments by year dual-purpose templates| ]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove obsolete category Establishments and disestablishments by year dual-purpose templates
revision.text:
{{Category other|{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|find|{{PAGENAME}}|^A?D? ?%d+ ?B?C? d?i?s?establishments$|plain=false}}|0|{{Error|Invalid page name.

(d?i?s?establishments)$|%1|1|false}}|signed_year={{#ifexpr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{PAGENAME}}|BC|plain=false}} > 0|{{#expr: -{{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|pattern=^A?D? ?(%d?%d?%d?%d) ?B?C? (d?i?s?establishments)$|%1|1|false}} }}|{{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|pattern=^A?D? ?(%d?%d?%d?%d) ?B?C? (d?i?s?establishments)$|%1|1|false}}}}|year_full_text={{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|pattern=^(A?D? ?%d?%d?%d?%d ?B?C?) (d?i?s?establishments)$|%1|1|false}}|bc={{#ifexpr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{PAGENAME}}|BC|plain=false}} > 0|1}}|type={{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|pattern=^A?D? ?(%d?%d?%d?%d) ?B?C? (d?i?s?establishments)$|%2|1|false}}}}}}|{{Error|This page is not in the [[Wikipedia:Namespace|category namespace]].
[[Template:(Dis)establishments in year category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form {{nowrap|"YYYY establishments"}} or {{nowrap|"YYYY disestablishments"}}, where YYYY is an AD year (e.g. "2", "63", "815" or "1972"}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]}}{{Automatic category TOC}}{{Documentation|content=To make a category of the form "YYYY establishments" or "YYYY disestablishments", where YYYY is a year e.g. * [[:Category:6 establishments]] * [[:Category:95 establishments]] * [[:Category:727 establishments]] * [[:Category:1842 establishments]] * [[:Category:9 disestablishments]] * [[:Category:420 disestablishments]] * [[:Category:525 disestablishments]] * [[:Category:2013 disestablishments]] ==Usage== {{(Dis)establishments in year category header}} No parameters needed == See also == * [[Template:(Dis)establishments in decade category header]] }}

revision.text:

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "â†µâ†µâ†µ" to " "
revision.text:
{{Category other|{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|find|{{PAGENAME}}|^A?D? ?%d+ ?B?C? d?i?s?establishments$|plain=false}}|0|{{Error|Invalid page name.
[[Template:(Dis)establishments in year category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form {{nowrap|"YYYY establishments"}} or {{nowrap|"YYYY disestablishments"}}, where YYYY is an AD year (e.g. "2", "63", "815" or "1972"}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]|{{(Dis)establishments in year category header/core|year={{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|pattern=^A?D? ?(%d?%d?%d?%d) ?B?C? (d?i?s?establishments)$|%1|1|false}}|signed_year={{#ifexpr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{PAGENAME}}|BC|plain=false}} > 0|{{#expr: -{{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|pattern=^A?D? ?(%d?%d?%d?%d) ?B?C? (d?i?s?establishments)$|%1|1|false}} }}|{{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|pattern=^A?D? ?(%d?%d?%d?%d) ?B?C? (d?i?s?establishments)$|%1|1|false}}}}|year_full_text={{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|pattern=^(A?D? ?%d?%d?%d?%d ?B?C?) (d?i?s?establishments)$|%1|1|false}}|bc={{#ifexpr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{PAGENAME}}|BC|plain=false}} > 0|1}}|type={{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|pattern=^A?D? ?(%d?%d?%d?%d) ?B?C? (d?i?s?establishments)$|%2|1|false}}}}}}|{{Error|This page is not in the [[Wikipedia:Namespace|category namespace]].
[[Template:(Dis)establishments in year category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form {{nowrap|"YYYY establishments"}} or {{nowrap|"YYYY disestablishments"}}, where YYYY is an AD year (e.g. "2", "63", "815" or "1972"}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]}}{{Automatic category TOC}}{{Documentation|content=To make a category of the form "YYYY establishments" or "YYYY disestablishments", where YYYY is a year e.g. * [[:Category:6 establishments]] * [[:Category:95 establishments]] * [[:Category:727 establishments]] * [[:Category:1842 establishments]] * [[:Category:9 disestablishments]] * [[:Category:420 disestablishments]] * [[:Category:525 disestablishments]] * [[:Category:2013 disestablishments]] ==Usage== {{(Dis)establishments in year category header}} No parameters needed == See also == * [[Template:(Dis)establishments in decade category header]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
